title: GameChanger Law acts on Newtrace pre-Series A fundraise
description: Newtrace Private Limited has raised $6.3 million from a pre-Series A fundraise led by HDFC Bank and Mitsui Sumitomo Insurance Venture Capital, with participation from Peak XV’s Surge, Aavishkaar Capital, Speciale Invest, Micelio Technology Fund, and angel investors Manish Prataprai Gandhi and Renu Manish Gandhi.GameChanger Law Advisors advised Speciale Invest on this fundraise.The transaction was led by Samheeta Rao (Senior Partner).Samheeta RaoFounded by Prasanta Sarkar and
